creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
The attached diffs upgrade the the eterm port from 0.6apl2 to
0.7+PL4.  I've cleared this with the port's maintainer, Murray Stokely
<murray@cdrom.com>.

This adds a patches directory and the files patches/patch-aa,
patches/patch-ab, patches/patch-ac and patches/patch-ad to the port
directory.

If the diffs didn't come through unmangled, they can also be found at
http://www.infonex.com/~dacroyle/ports/eterm.diff
-- 
I've always wanted to be a dilettante,  | Usenet II -- because
but I've never quite been ready to make | it's time for October
the commitment.                         | http://www.usenet2.org
